code: import{createTheme}from'@mui/material/styles';const theme=createTheme({palette:{mode:'dark',primary:{main:'#7bd1ff',contrastText:'#04203a'},secondary:{main:'#76e8d0'},error:{main:'#ff6b7a'},text:{primary:'#f2f8ff',secondary:'#d0e0ef'},background:{default:'#071321',paper:'rgba(13, 30, 48, 0.82)'}},typography:{fontFamily:'"Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", "Trebuchet MS", sans-serif',h4:{letterSpacing:0.2},h6:{letterSpacing:0.2}},shape:{borderRadius:14},components:{MuiCssBaseline:{styleOverrides:{body:{backgroundColor:'#071321',color:'#f2f8ff'}}},MuiPaper:{styleOverrides:{root:{border:'1px solid rgba(166, 210, 245, 0.26)',backdropFilter:'blur(14px)',WebkitBackdropFilter:'blur(14px)'}}},MuiCard:{styleOverrides:{root:{boxShadow:'0 18px 40px rgba(2, 8, 20, 0.45)',border:'1px solid rgba(166, 210, 245, 0.26)'}}},MuiTextField:{styleOverrides:{root:{'& .MuiOutlinedInput-root':{background:'rgba(4, 20, 35, 0.75)',color:'#f2f8ff','& fieldset':{borderColor:'rgba(166, 210, 245, 0.34)'},'&:hover fieldset':{borderColor:'rgba(166, 210, 245, 0.5)'}},'& .MuiInputLabel-root':{color:'#d0e0ef'}}}},MuiSelect:{styleOverrides:{select:{color:'#f2f8ff'}}},MuiChip:{styleOverrides:{root:{backgroundColor:'rgba(8, 26, 44, 0.86)',color:'#f2f8ff'}}},MuiDialog:{styleOverrides:{paper:{background:'linear-gradient(130deg, rgba(12, 36, 60, 0.95), rgba(8, 24, 41, 0.94))',border:'1px solid rgba(166, 210, 245, 0.24)'}}}}});export default theme;
